Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Job ratings, lifetime records, and role streak badges for CC.
Description: Tracks Casual and Ranked CC ratings per job, lifetime personal bests, and Tank/DPS/Healer streak achievements with official job icons. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Starts one fresh rating season once on update while preserving history and all-time records. Replaces swords with official job icons, rank-metal tints, and job-themed ornaments. Adds per-job rating/stat peaks plus Tank, DPS, and Healer Flawless and Win Streak badges.
